APPEARANCES - JONAS SANGALANG, TEL. NO. 724-7900, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. JULIA M. BRIGHTON OF DLA PIPER LLP, TEL. NO. 615-6091 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court modified its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: DEFENDANT MICHAEL BROWN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained in its entirety with 30 days leave to amend. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
